programme.title: Mr. Birthday
programme.desc: While working his maintenance job at an upscale hotel, Barry encounters the mysterious Mr. Jay. He introduces Barry to the International Birthday Network, an agency that helps children across the globe suffering from miserable birthdays.

programme.title: Norm Of The North: Family Vacation
programme.desc: Overwhelmed with his Kingly duties, Norm's crown is stolen and he embarks on a journey to find it in conjunction with repairing his family's relationship.

programme.title: Despicable Me
programme.desc: When a criminal mastermind uses a trio of orphan girls as pawns for a grand scheme, he finds their love is profoundly changing him for the better.

programme.title: Despicable Me 2
programme.desc: Gru, the world's most super-bad turned super-dad has been recruited by a team of officials to stop lethal muscle and a host of Gru's own, He has to fight back with new gadgetry, cars, & minion madness.

programme.title: Merry Ex Mas
programme.desc: During a blizzard at christmas, a man becomes snowbound with ex-wife, her wealthy suitor, his former mother in law, and his daughter.

programme.title: Trolls
programme.desc: After the Bergens invade Troll Village, Poppy, the happiest Troll ever born, and the curmudgeonly Branch set off on a journey to rescue her friends.

programme.title: Trolls World Tour
programme.desc: When the Queen of the Hard Rock Trolls tries to take over all the Troll kingdoms, Queen Poppy and her friends try different ways to save all the Trolls.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: The Movie
programme.desc: Ryder and the PAW Patrol pups are called to Adventure City in order to stop the recently-elected Mayor Humdinger from wreaking havoc.

programme.title: Rumble
programme.desc: In a world where monster wrestling is a global sport and monsters are superstar athletes, teenage Winnie seeks to follow in her father's footsteps by coaching a loveable underdog monster into a champion.

programme.title: Norm Of The North: King Sized Adventure
programme.desc: An ancient Chinese artifact has been stolen by a villainous archaeologist named Dexter. With the help of his Lemming friends, Norm must keep his word and embark on a journey across the world to help recover the artifact for the people of China.

programme.desc: This project focusing on South East Asian Award Winning and Critically Acclaimed Directors and as part of the A-List Inspiring South East Asia Film maker's project.

programme.desc: A girl relocates to a small town only to find it inhabited by ghosts. A struggle against a bad spirit ensues to keep the town's children safe.

programme.desc: Klaus is trying to send a love letter to his girlfriend who studying aboard. However all of his letters are censored.

programme.desc: Tajuk sajak Kijang Yang Lelah ini membincangkan tentang maksud sajak serta komponen sastera yang terkandung dalam sajak ini dan tentang tema, persoalan, gaya bahasa, nilai dan pengajaran.

programme.title: TVP@TTV B. Melayu Ting. 4 Ep02
programme.desc: Murid diperdengarkan dendangan syair untuk membangkitkan keseronokan dan menarik minat. Isi pelajaran menyentuh aspek maksud syair mengikut rangkap, tema, persoalan, gaya bahasa, nilai dan pengajaran.

programme.title: TVP@TTV B. Melayu Ting. 4 Ep03

programme.desc: Peribahasa dalam episod ini adalah yang terdapat dalam buku teks tingkatan 4 dan 5. Tujuan pdpc ini adalah untuk memberi pendedahan tentang bentuk soalan yang berkaitan dengan peribahasa.

programme.title: TVP@TTV B. Melayu Ting. 2 Ep01
programme.desc: Sajak ini memperlihatkan bait-bait puisi yang menyentuh tentang wanita yang mana penceritaan tentang bunga mawar adalah untuk memberi perlambangan tentang ketinggian maruah seorang wanita.

programme.title: Golden City - EP 567 / 多情城市
programme.desc: This drama is set in the Jiufen area from the 1960s to the 1970s. It tells the story of how three brothers conquered the world with their bare hands. Through the love story of the previous generation, it connects the common emotions between the two generations depicting the memories and in-depth exploration of the differences in values between them.

programme.title: Golden City - EP 568 / 多情城市
programme.desc: This drama is set in the Jiufen area from the 1960s to the 1970s. It tells the story of how three brothers conquered the world with their bare hands. Through the love story of the previous generation, it connects the common emotions between the two generations depicting the memories and in-depth exploration of the differences in values between them.

programme.title: (Live) Hello Singapore - EP 64 / 狮城有约
programme.desc: Delivering the day's latest news and social features that matter to you. Every Monday to Friday, from 6.30pm to 7.30pm on Channel 8.

programme.title: Heavenly Hand - EP 9 / 麻雀乐团
programme.desc: Situ Jiu, believing Jia Ming is his daughter, invites her to live with him, but Zhang Tie discourages him from rushing the reunion. At the same time, Cheng Qing and Cheng Lang also try to bring Jia Ming into the Situ residence, resulting in a conflict over her stay.

programme.title: Ojisan On The Road - EP 9 / 欧吉桑骑士-阿顺阿忠的中年危机
programme.desc: The brothers ride their scooters to eastern Taiwan! At this stop, they become interns at WildOne, the first non-profit wildlife hospital in the region. During their time there, they take part in animal feeding, enclosure setup and cleaning, and even assist in surgeries. They also help relocate a Formosan black bear—and experience the heartbreaking moment of losing a rescued animal

programme.title: No Other Way - EP 1 / 至死不渝
programme.desc: Promoted to the Major Crimes Unit, Zhou Shuheng takes on his first case: Zhao Minyi stabbed her husband, Huo Jianyu. Though skilled, Shuheng struggles to connect with colleagues and works with his sister, prosecutor Zhou Keying. Minyi hides her motive but breaks down upon seeing her son, Damian, raising suspicion. Shuheng learns of his mother’s death and rushes home but is unable to shed tears.

programme.title: (Live) News Tonight / 晚间新闻
programme.desc: Daily evening updates on top local news and world news.

programme.title: Friend of Forest - EP 9 / 动物森游岛
programme.desc: Two groups of hosts went to islands in the Caribbean and Japan respectively to look for unique animals on the islands.

programme.title: Swords into Plowshares - EP 44 / 太平年
programme.desc: The narrative follows three young heroes — Zhao Kuangyin, Qian Hongchu, and Guo Rong — who navigate the chaos of war to unite rival states. Their journey of friendship, sacrifice, and the quest for peace offers a rich, emotionally engaging experience for viewers.

programme.title: The Legend of Heroes - Hot Blooded - EP 9 / 金庸武侠世界之铁血丹心
programme.desc: The foolish young lad, Guo Jing, ultimately matures into a national hero who stands for the country and the people, embodying the true essence of chivalry.

programme.title: Super Taste Hungry Generations - EP 4 / 食尚玩家 - 腹饿代
programme.desc: This series will bring viewers to more interesting places like in Japan and Korea as well as different corners of Taiwan.

programme.title: Code Of Honour - EP 7 / 正义武馆
programme.desc: This is a freshly repackaged classic drama, with Chinese Martial Arts as its main selling point. Infused with the touch of pugilistic novels, an emphasis on feelings of righteousness, and glimpses of how legends are created.

programme.title: Code Of Honour - EP 8 / 正义武馆

programme.title: My One And Only - EP 27 / 只此一家
programme.desc: Limin and Huiling mediate between Elaine and Daniel and help the couple reconcile. Jingjing finds her undergarments going missing. Zhongyi tells Huiling the reason why he doesn't celebrate his birthdays. Huiling comforts him but continues hiding the truth about his parents. Huiling tells Limin that Zhongyi's birth mother May will be released from prison soon.

programme.desc: Jojo disedut ke dalam buku dan jumpa Didi. Disana terdapat Belalang serta semut-semut yang sibuk bersiap untuk musim sejuk. Belalang asyik bermain muzik; Didi, Jojo dan semut-semut terus mengumpul makanan.

programme.title: Didi & Friends Story Time Ep04
programme.desc: Akar menjalar terus membesar menutupi perpustakaan magikal. Sementara itu, Didi dan Jojo bertemu dengan Beruang si penggembala yang suka meminta tolong kerana kebosanan. Tiba-tiba, Serigala muncul.

programme.title: Didi & Friends Story Time Ep05
programme.desc: Aera terus membaca ketika akar perlahan-lahan merayap ke dalam perpustakaan. Sementara itu, Didi, Nana dan Jojo membina rumah, tetapi sebaik sahaja siap, Serigala tiba-tiba muncul di hadapan mereka.

programme.title: Didi & Friends Story Time Ep06
programme.desc: Aera disedut ke dalam buku sebagai Si Tudung Merah. Dia berangkat melawat Nek Kura tetapi bertemu dengan Serigala. Serigala segera menculik Nek Kura, menyamar sebagai dirinya, dan menunggu ketibaan Aera.
